when_to_use: Real-time payment fraud scoring for core banking systems
Internal fraud detection via employee behavioral profiling
Scam detection for APP fraud prevention at banks

pros: 3D AI engine aimed at real bank fraud patterns
Lower false positives vs rule-based legacy

review.verdict: Useful niche fraud engine for European banks, but ongoing M&A makes it a careful due diligence pick.
review.best_for: European banks seeking AI-driven payment and internal fraud detection.
review.not_for: Fintechs outside traditional banking or teams needing broader identity and bot coverage.
